chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-1917 of 2022 _______________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) For order as to maintainability of petition 13.08.2025 Mr. Manzar Bashir Memon, advocate for respondent No.2 Mr. Sandeep Malani, AAG --------- This is an old petition of 2022, which is over 03 years ago. On the last date of hearing i.e. 01.06.2022, which is over 03 years ago, the petitioner was directed to satisfy the Court about maintainability of the petition. In the last 03 years, learned counsel for the petitioner has made no serious efforts to pursue this old petition diligently and the question of maintainability still remains outstanding. Today, despite the lapse of 03 years, none present for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution. Head of Const. Benches Judge Nadir*
